description_long: This object is a classic regulatory stop sign, featuring a red octagonal face with a bold white border and the word 'STOP' in large, uppercase white letters at its center. The sign is mounted on a tall, cylindrical black pole, which is typical for roadside installations. The red surface of the sign is likely made from reflective material to ensure high visibility both day and night. The pole appears to be made of metal, providing durability and stability in outdoor environments. The rear of the sign is plain and dark, with no visible markings or text. The overall construction suggests it is designed for use at intersections or pedestrian crossings to control vehicle flow and enhance safety.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with white uppercase 'STOP' text, mounted on a black metal pole. The sign is reflective and designed for roadside visibility.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: A rear view displaying the plain, dark back of the octagonal sign and the supporting pole.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, showing the slim edge of the sign and pole.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the red octagonal sign with white 'STOP' text and a white border, mounted on a black pole.
